text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time since I noticed my health starting to deteriorate.
Unfortunately, I haven't sensed much improvement either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe has been urging me to return home immediately after
our training sessions lately. I thought that by doing so, I'd be getting
all the rest I need...
choice_data_list: (No work today. How about some fresh air!)
(No work today. How about some fresh air!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Staying cooped up in here can't be good for me either. I grab the
handle of my front door and give it a spirited twist...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Hello.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find Manhattan Cafe standing on the other side. Just how long has
she been there?
choice_data_list: Oh, sorry! Did we make plans for today?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No... I just happened to be passing by.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Are you... going somewhere?
choice_data_list: I could use some fresh air.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...
Um... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I guess... that'd be fine. If we're together...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'll come with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since we're together, I begin to think that a more drastic change of
scenery might be nice. What kind of place might she enjoy?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This place is actually...
choice_data_list: Oh, were you not a fan of aquariums?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's not it... I was just thinking that this place... is a bit darker than I
would have thought...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: We can't become separated... Give me your hand.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Don't even think about... letting go. Now, shall we be off?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hand-in-hand, we stroll about the aquarium. It's rather busy, likely
because today is a holiday. The crowd in front of the central tank is
especially large.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...It's quite pretty, isn't it? And as long as there are people around...
then...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh no, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm carried off by the wave of people. Separated from Manhattan
Cafe, I find myself in an empty hallway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This area is suffocatingly quiet. Is it a staff-only corridor? It's also
bone-chillingly cold. Do they really keep the air conditioning that
strong in here?
choice_data_list: (I need to get back to Cafe...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I turn around and begin searching for a door, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snatch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though someone, or something, has grabbed on to both of
my ankles. No matter how much I struggle, I can't budge an inch.

text_block_list.name: Muffled Voice
text_block_list.text: Play... with... me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't dare to even glance down at my feet. All the while, I feel like
they are being dragged out from under me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Stop!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer... Thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's get out of here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm thankful to be outdoors. The bright warmth offers a much-needed
sense of relief. Just what had happened back there?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Are you feeling... better?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's good. We should be okay... out here.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... That was careless of me. It's usually fine when there are so
many people around.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It looks like... little can stop it now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid... it might come after you again.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's... hard to explain.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: There's something else... but it's not like my Friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This one... seems more like a bad memory... or a regret... It's stuck
here... like a scar...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's probably better... if we don't talk about it. Our interest might be...
stirring it to act...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Do you actually... believe me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
In that case... you should be very careful. Try to stay near... other
people.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Please give me... just a little more time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The look on her face is one that I've been seeing a lot lately—entirely
serious.
choice_data_list: Too bad about our aquarium trip, though...
Too bad about our aquarium trip, though...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: For now... that's just how it is. Please be patient—
choice_data_list: I really wanted to do something nice for you...
I really wanted to do something nice for you...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: For me? But I thought... you were the one who wanted to go...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer... You...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You put yourself in harm's way... just for me... That might explain it......

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No... It's nothing. Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Once this is all over... we should come here again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She walks by my side as we make our way back to the academy,
though she spends most of the time gazing at the ground.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Please don't worry... I can do this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She wears an expression of intense determination.
